meta.title: TransCircle Project | Chinese MtF Transgender Community Archive
meta.description: TransCircle Project is a community archive for the Chinese MtF transgender community: archiving stories, documenting history, uniting peers, and fighting for transgender rights. Our very existence is the greatest act of defiance against malice.

app.subtitle: Our very existence is the greatest act of defiance against malice.
app.greeting: Welcome! We are in the early preparation stage of the TransCircle Project.
app.aboutP1: For a long time, the Chinese MtF community has had a peculiar phenomenon: we have fairly comprehensive community wikis and HRT guides, but almost no place that bears witness to our community's existence and resistance.
app.aboutP2: The transgender community is highly fluid; many stories have happened here, but no one has ever fully documented them.
app.aboutP3: Thus, this transfeminine community archive project was born. We hope to archive our stories, unite the community, and fight for transgender rights.
app.emphasis: We firmly believe that history will move forward. This record is the testimony that we walked through the long night.
